name: Spiral Turn
preceding_figure_names: Aida, Alemana, Hand To Hand, Natural Top, Opening Out To Right And Left, Progressive Walks Forward in Right Shadow Position, Reverse Top, Rope Spinning, Sliding Doors, Three Alemanas
following_figure_names: Alemana, Hockey Stick, Sliding Doors, Three Alemanas, Basic Movements: Open, Open Hip Twist, Curl, Three Threes, New York LSP, Spot or Switch Turn To R, Underarm Turn To L, Reverse Top
notes:
Alternatives:
Underturned Spiral Turn:
Man: turn 1/8 L over step 5 and 6 to end in Open Position with RF fwd.
Lady 3/4 L after she has placed step 3. End in Tandem Position with Man; Lady LF fwd; RF fwd in line with LF, then turn 1/2 to end with RF back; then LF back.
Ending in Open Position:
Man turn 3/8 to L over step 5 and 6.
Ending in Open CPP.
End in Contact Position: Closed Spiral
Man turn 5/8 to L over step 5 and 6 to Contact Position, to end RF side and slightly fwd, overturning Lady, keeping fingers lightly in contact with Lady's waist throughout as she turns within the circle of his R arm. On step 4, lower arms to normal position.
Lady: make a complete turn L over step 4 to 6 to end LF behind RF as Cuban Cross

steps.action: Close LF to RF, slight body turn to L to normal position
comments: Return arms to normal position and raise L hand above Lady's R shoulder to circle counter clockwise

steps.action: RF fwd and slightly across LF in front of Man, then turn underarm, allowing LF to cross in front without weight
comments: Lady can use extended forward walk.
Turn could also be made on the R toe with heel well off the floor (High Spiral).
At end of 1, make sure to settle R hip before stepping next step.
